title: TagInfo
description: Information and statistics for a message tag.

reputation.description: The reputation score for the tag (0-100).

sent.description: Total number of messages sent with this tag.

hard_bounces.description: Total hard bounces for messages with this tag.

soft_bounces.description: Total soft bounces for messages with this tag.

rejects.description: Total rejects for messages with this tag.

complaints.description: Total spam complaints for messages with this tag.

unsubs.description: Total unsubscribes for messages with this tag.

opens.description: Total opens for messages with this tag.

clicks.description: Total clicks for messages with this tag.

unique_opens.description: Unique opens for messages with this tag.

unique_clicks.description: Unique clicks for messages with this tag.
